name: Hash Brown Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 32 oz. bag of (cubed) hash browns (thaw for 1/2 hour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into a 9X14 pan.
3. Sprinkle with parsley and paprika.
4. Top with 1 1/2 cups of crushed corn flakes.
5. Bake for 1 hour at 350.
Variations:
Use Mrs. Dash instead of salt and pepper
I've used the different creamed soups along with the cream of chicken (broccoli, mushroom, celery, etc.) when baking a double batch
Bacon bits can be sprinkled on with the parsley and paprika
Different cheeses can be used too...I've tried nacho cheese for a spicier taste, or pizza cheeses for a stringier cheese
Rice Krispies can be used in place of corn flakes
